nodes.name: opencode-config.test.js
nodes.summary: Tests for ECC's OpenCode configuration integration, verifying that the plugin config file is valid and contains required settings for OpenCode compatibility.

nodes.name: opencode-plugin-hooks.test.js
nodes.summary: Tests that ECC plugin hooks function correctly within an OpenCode environment, verifying hook registration, client creation, and failure handling.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Main test entry point for OpenCode plugin hook tests, orchestrating plugin loading, client creation, and hook invocation scenarios.

nodes.name: opencode-tools.test.js
nodes.summary: Tests for ECC tools when run under OpenCode, verifying tool loading, mock context injection, and correct behavior in the OpenCode tool execution environment.

nodes.name: loadTools
nodes.summary: Loads all ECC tools from the plugin directory and returns them for inspection and invocation in tests.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Main test driver that exercises each loaded OpenCode tool with mock contexts and asserts correct output and side effects.

nodes.name: plugin-manifest.test.js
nodes.summary: Validates the ECC plugin manifest JSON for structural correctness, required fields, and consistency with the markdown files declared in the manifest.

nodes.name: collectMarkdownFiles
nodes.summary: Recursively collects all markdown file paths under a given directory for manifest completeness verification.

nodes.name: run-all.js
nodes.summary: Test runner entry point that discovers and sequentially executes all test files in the tests/ directory, reporting pass/fail counts and timing.

nodes.name: walkFiles
nodes.summary: Recursively walks a directory tree and yields all file paths matching a given predicate, used for test file discovery.

nodes.name: build-opencode.test.js
nodes.summary: Tests for the build-opencode script, verifying that it correctly assembles the OpenCode plugin bundle with all required components.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Runs the build-opencode script in a temporary directory and asserts that output files, structure, and content match expected bundle layout.

nodes.name: catalog.test.js
nodes.summary: Tests for the catalog script, verifying that the ECC component catalog is generated with correct entries, fields, and formatting.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Exercises the catalog script across multiple scenarios and asserts correct catalog entry generation and output formatting.

nodes.name: check-unicode-safety.test.js
nodes.summary: Tests for the unicode safety checker script, verifying detection of dangerous unicode sequences, homoglyphs, and zero-width characters in project files.

nodes.name: claw.test.js
nodes.summary: Tests for the claw utility script, exercising project-scanning, rule discovery, and configuration assembly functionality.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Comprehensive test runner for the claw script covering rule discovery, config generation, path resolution, and output formatting.

nodes.name: codex-hooks.test.js
nodes.summary: Tests for the Codex hooks integration, verifying hermetic execution of hooks in simulated Codex worker environments with plugin cache seeding.

nodes.name: makeHermeticCodexEnv
nodes.summary: Creates a hermetically isolated environment for Codex hook tests by setting up a clean temp directory with required env variables and plugin cache.

nodes.name: consult.test.js
nodes.summary: Tests for the consult script, validating multi-model consultation output parsing, match finding, and result formatting.

nodes.name: runTests
nodes.summary: Test driver for the consult script covering JSON parsing, result matching, and output formatting scenarios.

nodes.name: dashboard-web.test.js
nodes.summary: Large test suite for the dashboard-web script, covering HTML generation, data aggregation, and file output for the ECC web dashboard.
